pub load_ylwblupikmin_sprites()   'call this method from main to load sprites
	debug(`screen spritedef 0 16 16 `uhex_byte_array_(@ylwblupikmin_0, 256) `uhex_long_array_(@ylwblupikmin_0_colors, 57))
	debug(`screen spritedef 1 16 16 `uhex_byte_array_(@ylwblupikmin_1, 256) `uhex_long_array_(@ylwblupikmin_1_colors, 55))
	debug(`screen spritedef 2 16 16 `uhex_byte_array_(@ylwblupikmin_2, 256) `uhex_long_array_(@ylwblupikmin_2_colors, 42))
	debug(`screen spritedef 3 16 16 `uhex_byte_array_(@ylwblupikmin_3, 256) `uhex_long_array_(@ylwblupikmin_3_colors, 41))
	debug(`screen spritedef 4 16 16 `uhex_byte_array_(@ylwblupikmin_4, 256) `uhex_long_array_(@ylwblupikmin_4_colors, 58))
	debug(`screen spritedef 5 16 16 `uhex_byte_array_(@ylwblupikmin_5, 256) `uhex_long_array_(@ylwblupikmin_5_colors, 51))
	debug(`screen spritedef 6 16 16 `uhex_byte_array_(@ylwblupikmin_6, 256) `uhex_long_array_(@ylwblupikmin_6_colors, 55))
	debug(`screen spritedef 7 16 16 `uhex_byte_array_(@ylwblupikmin_7, 256) `uhex_long_array_(@ylwblupikmin_7_colors, 37))

dat ylwblupikmin_tiles byte {
}0,	1,	2,	3,	{
}4,	5,	6,	7

con 'ylwblupikmin sprites
dat ylwblupikmin_0 byte {
}$00,$00,$00,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$01,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$01,$02,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$01,$03,$04,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$01,$05,$06,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$01,$07,$08,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$09,$0a,$0b,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$0c,$0d,$0e,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$0f,$10,$11,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$12,$13,$14,$15,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$16,$17,$18,$19,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$1a,$1b,$1c,$1d,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$01,$01,$01,$01,$00,$1e,$1f,$20,$21,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$01,$22,$23,$01,$24,$25,$26,$27,$28,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$01,$29,$2a,$2b,$2c,$2d,$2e,$2f,$30,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$01,$31,$32,$33,$34,$35,$36,$37,$38,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00{
}
ylwblupikmin_0_colors long {
}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x0  -  0
}%11111111_00000000_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x1  -  1
}%11111111_01001101_01000001_00011010,{ 'index=0x2  -  2

}%11111111_01110100_01101000_01000000,{ 'index=0x4  -  4

}%11111111_00111011_00110000_00011110,{ 'index=0x6  -  6
}%11111111_01101110_01100101_01001101,{ 'index=0x7  -  7
}%11111111_01100001_01010010_00101010,{ 'index=0x8  -  8
}%11111111_00101000_00001000_00000000,{ 'index=0x9  -  9
}%11111111_10100010_10010011_01011101,{ 'index=0xa  -  10
}%11111111_00111111_00110011_00101101,{ 'index=0xb  -  11
}%11111111_00010101_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0xc  -  12
}%11111111_10100001_10010011_01001101,{ 'index=0xd  -  13
}%11111111_01000101_00111010_00101001,{ 'index=0xe  -  14
}%11111111_00100001_00000011_00000000,{ 'index=0xf  -  15

}%11111111_11111011_11101110_10000111,{ 'index=0x13  -  19
}%11111111_00101110_00001101_00001110,{ 'index=0x14  -  20
}%11111111_00110001_00101001_00011011,{ 'index=0x15  -  21

}%11111111_11110101_11100011_01110101,{ 'index=0x17  -  23
}%11111111_01010011_01000001_00001011,{ 'index=0x18  -  24
}%11111111_01110000_01100001_01001110,{ 'index=0x19  -  25
}%11111111_01110111_01111010_00111001,{ 'index=0x1a  -  26
}%11111111_11111111_11110100_01101100,{ 'index=0x1b  -  27

}%11111111_01100010_01010100_00011110,{ 'index=0x1d  -  29
}%11111111_10001000_01111101_00001000,{ 'index=0x1e  -  30

}%11111111_11111000_11111000_01011100,{ 'index=0x20  -  32
}%11111111_10111110_10111011_01000011,{ 'index=0x21  -  33
}%11111111_01000110_00010011_00000000,{ 'index=0x22  -  34
}%11111111_10100110_01010111_00000010,{ 'index=0x23  -  35
}%11111111_11001000_10000110_00010111,{ 'index=0x24  -  36
}%11111111_11100111_11110011_00101101,{ 'index=0x25  -  37
}%11111111_11110010_11111011_01001001,{ 'index=0x26  -  38
}%11111111_11011101_11100000_01000010,{ 'index=0x27  -  39
}%11111111_10001101_10000111_00101010,{ 'index=0x28  -  40
}%11111111_11000011_10000000_00110110,{ 'index=0x29  -  41
}%11111111_10111110_01100011_00010100,{ 'index=0x2a  -  42
}%11111111_11111100_10110001_01001011,{ 'index=0x2b  -  43
}%11111111_11101111_11111010_01011111,{ 'index=0x2c  -  44
}%11111111_11110110_11111011_01111100,{ 'index=0x2d  -  45
}%11111111_11111000_11111000_01111110,{ 'index=0x2e  -  46
}%11111111_01111010_01110100_00000110,{ 'index=0x2f  -  47
}%11111111_01011101_01011010_00111001,{ 'index=0x30  -  48
}%11111111_10111110_10010111_01010110,{ 'index=0x31  -  49

}%11111111_10110010_10101100_00111100,{ 'index=0x37  -  55
}%11111111_01100100_01100001_00101110{ 'index=0x38  -  56

ylwblupikmin_4 byte {
}$00,$00,$00,$01,$02,$03,$04,$01,$04,$05,$06,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$07,$08,$09,$0a,$04,$0b,$0c,$0d,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$07,$0e,$0f,$10,$11,$12,$13,$14,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$15,$16,$17,$18,$19,$1a,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$1b,$1c,$1d,$1e,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
